title: Replace second gallery image with campus corridor photo

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, replace the image element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/section[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/img[1] (the second image slot in the 'Our Campus' gallery section) with an element sourcing the new asset at /assets/generated/campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg. Use object-fit: cover so it fills the gallery card consistently with other gallery images.

quotes: replace the second image slot in the 'Our Campus' gallery section (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/section[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/img[1]) with the uploaded corridor photo (IMG_6461.png), saved as a new asset

acceptanceCriteria: The second image card in the 'Our Campus' gallery section displays the school corridor photo (campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg).
The image uses object-fit: cover and fills the card at the same dimensions as other gallery images.
No broken image placeholders are visible in the gallery section.
All other gallery slots (first image and placeholder cards) remain unchanged.

constraints: Only modify the second image slot in the gallery section; do not alter any other gallery cards or sections.
Do not route the image through the backend; serve it as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/.
nonGoals: Adding a link button to the gallery (deferred to a future request).
Replacing any other images on the homepage or other pages.
Modifying the hero section or any other section outside the gallery.

edits: Crop to landscape, remove phone UI chrome (status bar and browser bar) from top and bottom, enhance brightness slightly (IMG_6461.png > campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg)
